allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update TALES project with multi-user authentication, UI improvements, and new features

This commit includes:
- Multi-user authentication system with Google OAuth and email/password login
- User management and admin features
- Updated UI with new TALES branding and purple theme
- Customized Queries, Competitors, and Descriptors pages with bold titles
- New documentation for OAuth setup and credentials
- Report generation functionality
- Database migration scripts for multi-user support
- Enhanced API endpoints with user-scoped data access
- New frontend pages for Settings, Reports, and Data Analysis

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Transform TALES to brand-agnostic system with AI-powered setup and enhanced UX

Major Features:
- Brand Info management system for multi-tenant customization
- AI-powered content generation (queries, descriptors, competitors) using Gemini
- Interactive setup flow with choice between AI generation or manual entry
- Brand-agnostic analysis system replacing PPPL-specific implementation
- Enhanced first-time user experience with contextual guidance

Backend Changes:
- Created BrandInfo model with strategic_messages field
- Added AI generation service (ai_generator.py) for automated content creation
- Refactored database schema: pppl_* columns → brand_* columns
- Updated Response model fields: brand_mentioned, brand_position
- Modified analyze_responses.py to use dynamic brand context in prompts
- Updated all analytics queries to use brand_* fields
- Added /brand-info/generate endpoint for AI-powered content creation

Frontend Changes:
- Created BrandInfo management page with comprehensive form
- Added success dialog after Brand Info save with AI generation options
- Implemented brand switcher showing AI generation progress
- Updated Dashboard to display dynamic brand name in metrics
- Added first-time user guidance on Customize page
- Made TALES logo clickable to return to dashboard
- Reordered Customize page: Brand Info first (teal button)
- Updated button styling: Competitors (lavender), Brand Info (teal)

Database Migrations:
- Renamed columns: pppl_mentioned → brand_mentioned, pppl_position → brand_position
- Renamed: target_for_pppl → is_target, pppl_coverage → brand_coverage
- Added strategic_messages to brand_info table

UX Improvements:
- Dashboard message for new users: "Click on Customize → Brand Info to begin!"
- Customize page alert for users without brand info (Step 1 guidance)
- Loading states with progress messages during AI generation
- Automatic navigation to Queries page after setup
- Brand Info button positioned first and highlighted in teal

AI Integration:
- Gemini-powered query generation (10 relevant questions)
- Descriptor generation (15 ideal descriptive terms)
- Competitor identification (8-12 organizations)
- Context-aware prompts using brand name, industry, and description
- Brand-specific analysis replacing hardcoded PPPL references

System now supports any brand with personalized AI analysis and automated setup workflow.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add multi-brand foundation: database schema and model updates

Phase 1 of multi-brand implementation - foundational database changes:

Database Changes:
- Removed UNIQUE constraint on brand_info.user_id (users can now have multiple brands)
- Added is_active BOOLEAN field to brand_info table
- Added brand_id foreign key to all data tables:
  * queries, responses, target_descriptors, competitors
  * reports, campaigns, cited_sources
- Created indexes on brand_id columns for performance
- Created composite indexes (user_id, brand_id) for common queries
- Backfilled existing data with brand_id from users'' existing brand_info

Model Updates:
- Updated BrandInfo model: removed unique constraint, added is_active field
- Added brand_id ForeignKey to all data models:
  * Query, Response, Competitor, TargetDescriptor
  * Campaign, Report, CitedSource
- All models now support multi-brand data isolation

Schema Updates:
- Updated BrandInfo schemas to include is_active field
- Added BrandInfoList schema for efficient brand listing
- BrandInfoUpdate now supports is_active field updates

Infrastructure:
- Database now supports up to 20 brands per user
- Each brand''s data is isolated by brand_id
- Active brand tracking via is_active flag
- Backward compatible: existing data migrated successfully

Next Steps:
- Update CRUD operations to filter by brand_id
- Create brand management endpoints (list, activate, create multiple)
- Update frontend with brand switcher
- Implement brand context throughout application

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
